column1: I will go on a diet ... the holidays.
I think I will order dessert ... dinner.
... the bus arrived, the passengers rushed to board it.
... the bell rang, the students ran out of the class.
I need to have the letter ... Friday.
We won’t be seeing each other ... Christmas.
I should have said something to her ... I saw her earlier.
How are we going to pay the rent ... we have no money?
Flight attendants were checking our tickets ... we were looking at the control panels in front of us.
... he was working, he often listened to music.
